creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Sat Mar  2 05:41:16 2013
New Revision: 313189
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/313189

Log:
  - Update 3.1
  
  PR:		176572
  Submitted by:	ports fury

Added:
  head/games/golddig/pkg-install   (contents, props changed)
Deleted:
  head/games/golddig/files/
Modified:
  head/games/golddig/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/games/golddig/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/games/golddig/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/games/golddig/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/games/golddig/Makefile	Sat Mar  2 05:39:00 2013	(r313188)
+++ head/games/golddig/Makefile	Sat Mar  2 05:41:16 2013	(r313189)
@@ -2,25 +2,26 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	golddig
-PORTVERSION=	2.0
-PORTREVISION=	3
+PORTVERSION=	3.1
 CATEGORIES=	games
-MASTER_SITES=	ftp://qiclab.scn.rain.com/pub/games/
-DISTNAME=	golddig2
-EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tar.Z
+MASTER_SITES=	http://www.NetBSD.org/~chuck/gz/
+DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}C${PORTVERSION}
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Getting the Gold and Avoiding Death
 
-MAN6=		golddig.6
 USE_XORG=	x11
+MAKE_ENV=	X11BASE="${LOCALBASE}"
+MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=	yes
 
-pre-patch:
-	@(cd ${WRKSRC}; for i in 245 244 246 247; do \
-	    ${AWK} '{if (/^#!/) x++} {if(x) print $$0'} $$i| /bin/sh; \
-	  done; ${MV} golddig2/* .)
+LDFLAGS+=	-L${LOCALBASE}/lib
 
-pre-install:
-	@${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/lib/golddig
+MAN6=		gdedit.6 golddig.6
+
+DESKTOP_ENTRIES="Gold Digger" "" "" "${PORTNAME}" "" ""
+
+post-patch:
+	@${GREP} -lR "@PREFIX@" ${WRKSRC} | ${XARGS} ${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
+		's|@PREFIX@|${PREFIX}|'
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/games/golddig/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/games/golddig/distinfo	Sat Mar  2 05:39:00 2013	(r313188)
+++ head/games/golddig/distinfo	Sat Mar  2 05:41:16 2013	(r313189)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (golddig2.tar.Z) = ea72b666157e88b32e7e5de885d19763d81445499056fd3afeb4288994d50355
-SIZE (golddig2.tar.Z) = 68321
+SHA256 (golddigC3.1.tar.gz) = 823c1029ff47443c9aa52867db80bcafadebdaec123071f18031c48591b0c9ea
+SIZE (golddigC3.1.tar.gz) = 62024

Added: head/games/golddig/pkg-install
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/games/golddig/pkg-install	Sat Mar  2 05:41:16 2013	(r313189)
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+#!/bin/sh
+
+SCOREDIR="/var/games"
+SCOREFILE="/var/games/golddig.scores"
+
+[ "$2" != "POST-INSTALL" -o -f "$SCOREFILE" ] && exit 0
+
+mkdir -p $SCOREDIR
+touch $SCOREFILE
+chown root:games $SCOREFILE
+chmod 664 $SCOREFILE

@@ -1,23 +1,31 @@

-lib/golddig/goldlev018
-lib/golddig/scores
-@dirrm lib/golddig
